title: Lab 15: LVM Creation and Mount
description: Create a new volume group and logical volume and mount it persistently

tasks: On client, on /dev/sdb, create an LVM partition, then create volume group wgroupx with physical extent size 8 MiB.
On client, create logical volume wsharex with 50 extents, format it as ext4, and mount it persistently on /mnt/wsharex.
checks: pvs --noheadings -o pv_name,vg_name | awk '$1=="/dev/sdb1" && $2=="wgroupx"{found=1} END{exit !found}' && vgs --noheadings -o vg_name,vg_extent_size --units m --nosuffix | awk '$1=="wgroupx" && int($2)==8{found=1} END{exit !found}'

lv_path=/dev/wgroupx/wsharex; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/wgroupx-wsharex; mountpoint=/mnt/wsharex; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; test -n "$lv_uuid" && lvs --noheadings -o lv_name,vg_name,lv_size --units m --nosuffix "$lv_path" | awk '$1=="wsharex" && $2=="wgroupx" && $3>=399 && $3<=401{found=1} END{exit !found}' && blkid -o value -s TYPE "$lv_path" | grep -qx ext4 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "ext4" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
task_titles: on /dev/sdb, create an LVM partition, then create...
Create logical volume wsharex with 50 extents,...
solution_commands: parted -s /dev/sdb -- mklabel gpt mkpart primary 1MiB 100% set 1 lvm on
